path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali used to speak to Aqa ﷺ whenver he was angry.jpeg
text: hakim:4647 - Mukram b. Ahmad b. Mukram al-Qadi > Ja'far b. Abii Uthman al-Tayalisi > Yahy4 b. MaTn > Husayn al-Ashqar > Jafar b. ziyad al-Ahmar > Mukhawwal > Mundhir al-Thawri > Um Salamah [Machine] "When the Prophet £ got angry, none of us dared to speak to him except Ali ibn Abi Talib." @ - Repudiated (Dhahabi)
